      <p parentName="blockquote">{`Laravel's `}<em parentName="p">{`Events`}</em>{` provides a simple Observer pattern implementation, allowing you to subscribe and listen to various events that occur within your application. `}<em parentName="p">{`Event`}</em>{` classes are typically stored in the `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`app/Events`}</inlineCode>{` directory, while their `}<em parentName="p">{`Listeners`}</em>{` are stored in `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`app/Listeners`}</inlineCode>{` directory.     </blockquote>

Instead of coupling your order processing code to your Slack notification code, you can raise an `}<inlineCode parentName="p">{`App\\Events\\OrderShipped`}</inlineCode>{` event which a listener can receive and use to dispatch a Slack notification.`}</p>
